rule_metadata.name: _12ft_io
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool '12ft.io' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule _12ft_io
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool '12ft.io' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "12ft.io"
		rule_category = "greyware_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /https\:\/\/12ft\.io\/api\/proxy\?q\=http/ nocase ascii wide
		$string2 = /https\:\/\/12ft\.io\/proxy\?q\=/ nocase ascii wide

	condition:
		any of them
}
